title: Dahlia 'Mystic Illusion' Black Foliage with Bright Yellow Flowers, Long-Lasting Blooms, Ideal for Borders and Bouquets, 1X 3 Litre Pot by Thompson and Morgan
features: Striking contrast of dark black foliage and bright yellow flowers
Long-lasting single blooms that continue into autumn
Attracts pollinating insects to the garden
Excellent as a cut flower for late summer bouquets
description: Dahlia 'Mystic Illusion' is a showstopper with its unique combination of dark, almost black foliage and vivid yellow blooms. The single flowers create a dramatic contrast against the dark leaves, adding a splash of sunshine to your garden. These blooms are not only visually stunning but also provide continuous colour throughout the summer and well into autumn, even as other plants start to fade. Ideal for the middle of garden borders, 'Mystic Illusion' is a tall, resilient cultivar that draws in pollinators and adds height and structure to your planting scheme. This Dahlia also makes a charming cut flower, perfect for brightening up late summer bouquets with its cheerful colour and long-lasting beauty. How to Grow Instructions: Light: Needs full sun to thrive and produce the best blooms. Temperature: Prefers warm temperatures. Watering: Keep soil consistently moist but avoid waterlogging. Feeding: Use a balanced fertilizer during the growing season. Humidity: Enjoys moderate humidity; ensure proper airflow around the plant. Included Varieties: Dahlia 'Mystic Illusion': Features striking black foliage with bright yellow blooms, excellent for adding color to borders and creating eye-catching cut flower arrangements. Images shown are for guidance only and show the expected results of plants upon maturity. Different growing conditions might vary results. Image may be included for illustration of supply but can vary due to seasonality changes (e.g. deciduous plants lose leaves in colder months). Decorative pots are not supplied.
